nasb.text: And by chance a priest was going down on that road, and when he saw him, he passed by on the other side.

esv.text: Now by chance a priest was going down that road, and when he saw him he passed by on the other side.

cnv.text: 正好有一個祭司，從那條路下來，看見他，就從旁邊走過去了。

ccb.text: “刚好有位祭司经过，看见那人躺在地上，连忙从旁边绕过，继续赶路。

csbs.text: 恰好有一个祭司从那条路下来，看见他，就从另一边走了过去。
